name: Anna Suehiro
description: Anna is a teen model who is a good friend and classmate of Maiko; she is similarly well-known and experienced in modeling. From early on, Anna makes it clear that she disapproves of Shūichi dressing as a girl, and even calls her a freak. Anna initially tells Maho she has no interest in her "weak" brother because of her femininity, though later dates Shuuichi for a time after she asks her out. Furthermore, Anna's opinion of Shuuichi's cross-dressing also changes, saying that it actually suits her

name: Atuy
description: A cheerful, fearless girl eternally in search of true love. Her temperament vacillates between bubbly and — when a spear is put into her capable hands — violently fearsome, and her pet Kurarin, a jellyfish-like creature, can often be found perched atop her head like a hat. She speaks with a refined, albeit provincial accent. She is the daughter of the Eight Pillar General, Soyankekur the Mariner, and is the princess of Shayhoro. Living her entire life with the sea, her name itself is a homage to

name: Beck
description: Beck is Ryusuke's dog. Ryusuke's band was named 'BECK' by Chiba, in reference to Beck the dog.

name: Byakuya
description: The chief of Tenjin-ya's accounting department. He is strict and unfriendly with a practical approach to his work. However, he has a soft side and enjoys playing with the local tube kittens.

name: Chie
description: Chie is a cel-painter at the animation studio where Kintarou works as an errand-boy.

name: Chiharu Shiba
description: Leader of the Kurenai racing gangs, he is a street fighter that doesn't seem to feel pain. He fights Hatanaka Kouhei in round 1 where he severely breaks his own arm as a form of intimidation before viciously beating Kouhei. In round 2 he fights Ian McGregor with shadow bonding and nearly defeats the boxer. Shiba wins by breaking both of McGregors hands with his rock hard skull. name: Erika Sendou
description: __Height:__ 161 cm (5'3") A popular fifth-year student, as well as the student council vice-president. Erika is strong in literature classes and martial arts. She has an inquisitive personality, and likes to do things directly. Once she has her mind set on something, she becomes very pushy, and will take her time making plans to make sure she gets her way. Her older brother Iori is the student council president.

description: The mysterious leader of the Neo-Zeon remnant forces who is described as the "Second Coming of Char Aznable", the legendary Red Comet. Like Char, he is a tall blond man who hides his face behind a half-mask, wears a red uniform and pilots a red mobile suit. His face, voice and tone closely resemble those of Char as well. description: Owner of Happy Internet Cafe and the boss of Team Happy. She plays under the account Chasing Haze, a Launcher class.

name: Hamyuts Meseta
description: Along with Mokania the strongest armed librarian, she is the acting director of the Armed Librarians. She usually wears a white shirt with a small bunny cartoon on her right breast. She has a calm personality and always hopes to meet someone that can defeat her. She had a relationship with Mattalast in the past. name: Huahua Chen
description: __Species:__ Human Huahua is an information broker. She helps out Chu Qing if he needs any type of info on a person. This leads to them both becoming emotionally invested in one another to the point where she becomes Chu Qing's girlfriend. Huahua is now the technical directer at Chu Qing's mothers company.

name: Jeong-Woo Cha
description: Jeong-woo Cha is Yeon-woo Cha's younger twin brother. He was one of the strongest and the most famous high-ranker in the Tower before he was betrayed by his teammates leading to the events of the main story. Jeong-woo was described by Yeon-woo as being a weak and introverted person who liked books, movies, and had a talent of not needing much work to succeed in most things.
